nasb.text: For the day is near, Even the day of the Lord is near; It will be a day of clouds, A time of doom for the nations.

esv.text: For the day is near, the day of the Lord is near; it will be a day of clouds, a time of doom for the nations.

cnv.text: 因為那一天臨近了， 耶和華的日子臨近了， 就是密雲的日子， 列國受罰的時候。

ccb.text: 因为日子近了，耶和华的日子近了， 那是乌云密布的日子， 列国沦亡的时候。
